name: Best Pinto Bean Soup
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Dry Rose Brand Pinto Beans
2 Ham Hocks or 2 slices of ham
recipeInstructions:
1. Salt, pepper, and add vegetable salt to taste.
2. Cook beans with ham (diced) or ham hocks until almost done.
3. Add diced onions, celery, tomato sauce, and soup.
4. Add water as needed to achieve a medium thick consistency.
